raw_text: don't pay in advance payment... pay only cash on delivery because when you paid advance payment and got defected item there is no replacement.... but overall you can order almost all kind of groceries and daily use items...

Worst customer service. never take back or return items, send wrong items and when we claim it for return they intentionally avoid it making customers to write an email and followup for multiple times (generally people leave it bcoz it is a lengthy process, that's their agenda. even zepto is of same category)

Blinkit hasn't refunded my money; it’s a scam—they take double the payment but fail to issue refunds. I no longer trust Blinkit. Their customer care number doesn't connect, and they aren't doing anything to resolve the issue.😡

strawberries are not fresh and I expect them to be bigger in size however, the size of the strawberries are comparatively small. Sour in some parts compared to the other parts of the strawberry. the delivery is fast, no complaints. the fruits can be fresher and sweeter. the vegetables are fine. the available of a few items are mostly out of stock.However is a very fast option of any delivery and orders

well this app is very good and useful but today I order something and one product was missing i don't check it because this never happens to me and i have full trust on blinkit but after that order. i regret why i order and receive it without checking all products and the worst thing is even delivery man was not receiving call! then why there is call option? but the good thing is blinkit give me my refund!

It's return policy is worst, as they like have guided by the manager or supervisor that don't take return only exchange; I have to suffer with my products after exchanging and when I told to return they are telling me that's against policy! if you want to do something claim the warranty of the product! are they crazy or what? product I will buy from blinkit and after all they don't provide a good service so what are they doing for? are they only selling purpose only...

The best app I have went across for online last minute shopping . It has a wide range of product and dilevery usually gets done before the time mentioned in the start. despite the range of products there are many products that are out of stock I can consider that a problem but not exactly as the alternatives are always available and are actually good quality. I have never recieved a damaged or expired product.they should launch items like pages ,charts etc in less quantity to make it accessible

every time I am paying a surge fee for no reason, the same order I do it through other apps I am paying less and delivery time is also quicker. I have decided to uninstall this app and move on with other apps, i would suggest others also who are facing issues like me to uninstall this app and move on. The more customers they get the more cheap stunts are done.

blinkit is supposed to be last minute delivery app. but today, the order showed as 10 mins delivery but the delivery guy called after 25 mins. that too he didn't reach the correct address. because of the delay kids were late to school and had to go without food. the delivery came after we left for school. usually they are on time but today the app didn't serve the purpose.

"This is a really bad app. I placed two orders but the payment was deducted and I never received the items. It’s been a month now. Every time I complain, they say it takes 5-7 working days, but I still haven’t received my payment/refund."

they cancel delivery themselves lots of time like they are the customer and we are delivery person....it shows 15 minutes late then cancelled a order. I am not going to use this aap ever it has very bad service.

The products I received were filthy and sticky. It’s frustrating to pay 'handling charges' when the items are clearly not being handled with care. Total lack of quality control. I wouldn’t recommend ordering until they fix their delivery process.

best and really the last minute app I am very happy for 24×7 service but I need one more thing cash on delivery available 24×7 I am a student and don't use online payments please look out for these and please don't let the cash on delivery payment option be removed from the list if I have mistakenly cancelled and order if this is for safety please extend the limits that after 3 order cancelled with COD then the option will be removed otherwise best app

yep i know most don't agree with me but this app will only help with grocery and snacks stuff that`s all it limited to that much but when it comes to speakers or earphones (electronic devices) even if it is faulty theres no guarantee at all that they will accept that product and my best peice of advice about this app is that don't always believe what you see because when I ask them the about the 7 dayz replacement policy they rejected that they can't accept at all just for eating it is good
There are no loyalty programs, and the selection of imported could improve as well. Otherwise, blinkit is very good!!!

No customer support, i ordered a ubon 30 watt speaker I came defective and with missing remote I asked them for a replacement and for last two days they are just sending mails and trying to get rid of their responsibilities. rate this app one star and uninstall it.

I ordered Eye drops and it came in bad condition. It had rava sticking to it and the entire eye drop was sticky. In the replacement also they bought the same condition another piece! There is no option to cancel the item or even customer care service is very bad!

Initially, I faced an issue with my order but Blinkit support contacted me and quickly resolved it. I have now received the remaining packets and I appreciate their prompt assistance. Thank you for resolving the issue....

this brand deliver the order very fast and the products have long expiry date and the dairy products are so fresh too but they also stuck your money and don't return them also they do not have any costumer care number......... . . . . . . . . . . .😌👀

I recently ordered a Google Pixel adapter; the on Blinkit showed the actual Google Pixel adapter, but what I received is not the genuine one. Please don't fool people like this—show what is actually being sold. I didn't expect this from Blinkit; I would have been better off ordering from Flipkart or Amazon instead. 😡
